{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1075304?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/TristanInSec", "id": 1075304, "login": "TristanInSec", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEwNzUzMDQ=", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/TristanInSec", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55482", "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "### Impact
The `BulkAssetsController::update()` method accepts `company_id` directly from user input without calling `Company::getIdForCurrentUser()`, the standard company-scoping function used by every other controller in the codebase. A non-superadmin user can move assets across company boundaries, breaking multi-tenancy isolation.

### Patches
Patched in https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/commit/d58fda626e8febfeff4cabbc20ba03edfc411e18", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-33g4-646g-qwmm", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T23:03:47Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-33g4-646g-qwmm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-33g4-646g-qwmm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55482"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T23:03:47Z", "references": ["https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/security/advisories/GHSA-33g4-646g-qwmm", "https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it/commit/d58fda626e8febfeff4cabbc20ba03edfc411e18", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-33g4-646g-qwmm"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/grokability/snipe-it/security-advisories/GHSA-33g4-646g-qwmm", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it", "summary": "Snipe-IT has Multi-Tenancy Bypass via Bulk Asset Update", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T23:03:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-33g4-646g-qwmm", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "8.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "snipe/snipe-it"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 8.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Snipe-IT has Multi-Tenancy Bypass via Bulk Asset Update
